5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

0036.issue: [E0036] @iobroker/testing 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.2 is required as minimum,  5.2.2 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.zigbee2mqtt/blob/master/package.json)

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "aedes-persistence" (dependencies) can be updated from 9.1.2 to 10.2.2. The newer version has been published for 322 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.zigbee2mqtt/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.zigbee2mqtt/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
